content.speakerText: The printer isn't responding. It shows 'Offline' on my screen.
content.speakerTextCn: 打印机没反应，我的屏幕上显示‘离线’。

Are you using a USB drive

content.situation: 员工的电脑运行缓慢，频繁弹出错误提示，联系IT支持
content.speakerText: My computer is super slow and keeps popping up error messages.
